positive: A whimsical, stylized composition featuring a cluster of bioluminescent flora and celestial elements. The central subject is a glowing, stylized fox curled up amidst large, delicate ferns and glowing moon petals. The scene should have a deep indigo and teal color palette with bright pops of emerald green and warm gold light. Style should be highly detailed, graphic novel quality illustration mixed with Japanese woodblock print aesthetics. Use strong silhouettes, clean lines, and high contrast with dramatic rim lighting to make the glowing elements pop. The composition must be perfectly centered and isolated on a clear background, ideal for single-color screen printing or apparel art. Minimalist negative space is key.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, poor quality, low detail, bad anatomy, noisy, extra limbs, copyrighted, trademark, celebrity, artist name, bokeh, depth of field
